codeReview.summary: The fix is narrowly scoped and matches the feature contract: the dashboard now defers its initial history-preferences write until hydration has completed or real stored state already exists, which prevents default route-state from clobbering persisted revisit preferences while preserving route-driven player loading. Supporting regression tests cover both halves of the reported regression by proving preseeded history preferences survive a deep-link revisit and that a routed successful lookup prepends the active player without wiping prior saved lookups.

summary: Reviewed the rerun handoff, transcript skeleton, prior review context, user-testing rerun evidence, and commit c04c14b. The implementation satisfies the deep-link revisit storage-ordering requirements and I found no blocking or non-blocking issues in scope.
